Created attachment 250895
Update to v10.6.18

Update to MariaDB v10.6.18
- Remove no longer needed patch (patch-mysys_crc32_crc32c.cc) - see: https://github.com/MariaDB/server/commit/611cd6b9817e3649441533a332d8d8cc0665d1f1
- Remove no longer needed file from client pkg-plist - see: https://github.com/mariadb-corporation/mariadb-connector-c/commit/5c9eab55f0000eef383a930adcda125adebe421c#commitcomment-142279779
